title: Opening for Production Engineer at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
